description: Analyze the lipid binding site of the KcsA potassium channel using crystal structure PDB:1K4C. Isolate the KcsA chain (the channel itself, distinguishing it from the Fab crystallization chaperone in the asymmetric unit), locate the bound diacylglycerol lipid (DGA), and measure the minimum distance from any atom of the DGA lipid to any atom of the anchoring basic residues Arg64 and Arg89 on the KcsA chain. Create a clear structural figure showing the binding pocket. Save the figure to ~/PyMOL_Data/images/kcsa_lipid.png and a plain-text report to ~/PyMOL_Data/kcsa_lipid_report.txt containing the chain ID of KcsA (e.g., A, B, C) and the two minimum distance measurements in Angstroms.
